mnemonics: F.A.C.T.S. (Frequent, Automated, Continuous, Timely, Systematic) - for the core principles of CIE
keyPoints: CIE is an ongoing process of assessment integrated throughout the semester, not just at the end.
Its primary purposes are to provide timely feedback to students and improve the teaching-learning process.
Common methods include quizzes, assignments, presentations, and small projects.
commonMistakes: Treating CIE as a series of mini-exams rather than a formative feedback tool.
Focusing only on grading and scores instead of using the results to identify and address learning gaps.
Poorly aligning CIE tasks with the final course outcomes and objectives.
